languages.text: "И самый большой аппетит. Наверное, их покровительство и правда окажется полезным... Надо будет приставить к ним пару моих ребят, чтобы когда решат нас предать, быть в курсе".
"And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."
languages.original_text: "И самый большой аппетит. Наверное, их покровительство и правда окажется полезным... Надо будет приставить к ним пару моих ребят, чтобы когда решат нас предать, быть в курсе".

traits.locale_text: "And the greatest appetite of all. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my lads to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."
"And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."
"Typical aristocrats, not much different from the Tsares of Merov... Maybe their patronage will prove useful... until the time comes for us to be sacrificed."
"And the greatest appetite of all. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my lads to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."
"And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."

languages.text: 「典型的な貴族たち、メロフの皇帝たちと大差ない。彼らの庇護が役に立つかもしれない。犠牲になる時が来るまで」
languages.original_text: "Typical aristocrats, not much different from the Tsares of Merov... Maybe their patronage will prove useful... until the time comes for us to be sacrificed."

languages.text: "Ve en iştahlı olanları. Belki hamilikleri işe yarar... Onları gözlemesi için adamlarımdan birkaçını görevlendirmeliyim. Bize ihanet etmeye karar verirlerse bundan haberimiz olmalı."
languages.original_text: "And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."

traits.locale_text: "Ve en iştahlı olanları. Belki hamilikleri işe yarar... Onları gözlemesi için adamlarımdan birkaçını görevlendirmeliyim. Bize ihanet etmeye karar verirlerse bundan haberimiz olmalı."

languages.text: “胃口也最大。或许他们的庇护确实有用……我应该派几个人盯着他们。要是他们起了背叛之心，我们也该提前知道。”
languages.original_text: "And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."

traits.locale_text: “胃口也最大。或许他们的庇护确实有用……我应该派几个人盯着他们。要是他们起了背叛之心，我们也该提前知道。”

languages.text: "Und den größten Appetit. Vielleicht erweist sich ihre Unterstützung als nützlich ... Ich werde sie von einigen meiner Leute beobachten lassen. Sollten sie beschließen, uns zu verraten, erfahren wir es."
languages.original_text: "And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."

traits.locale_text: "Und den größten Appetit. Vielleicht erweist sich ihre Unterstützung als nützlich ... Ich werde sie von einigen meiner Leute beobachten lassen. Sollten sie beschließen, uns zu verraten, erfahren wir es."

languages.text: « Et un appétit dévorant. Leur protection s'avérera peut-être utile… Je devrais demander à certains de mes hommes de les surveiller. Qui sait quand ils décideront de nous trahir... »
languages.original_text: "And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."

traits.locale_text: « Et un appétit dévorant. Leur protection s'avérera peut-être utile… Je devrais demander à certains de mes hommes de les surveiller. Qui sait quand ils décideront de nous trahir... »

languages.text: «Y el mayor apetito. Puede que su patrocinio nos resulte útil... Asignaré a algunos de mis hombres a vigilarlos. Si deciden traicionarlos, lo sabremos».
languages.original_text: "And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."

traits.locale_text: «Y el mayor apetito. Puede que su patrocinio nos resulte útil... Asignaré a algunos de mis hombres a vigilarlos. Si deciden traicionarlos, lo sabremos».
